Transition Stewardship

Ref: {{ref}}
Pre-Close Board Resolution
Fee Authorization & Payment Acknowledgment
Company
{{companyName}}
Resolution Date
{{resolutionDate}}
Engagement Reference
{{ref}}
Closing Date (Expected)
{{expectedClosingDate}}
§ 01Recitals

WHEREAS, the Board of Directors (or equivalent governing body) of {{companyName}} ("Company") authorized the engagement of Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. ("Forhemit") pursuant to an Engagement Letter dated {{engagementDate}};

WHEREAS, the engagement includes a fee schedule comprising four milestone payments plus an annual stewardship fee, as set forth in Exhibit A of the Engagement Letter;

WHEREAS, three milestone payments have been earned and paid as of the date of this Resolution;

WHEREAS, the fourth milestone payment ("Success Balance") is due upon closing of the ESOP transaction;

NOW, THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED as follows:

§ 02Prior Payment Acknowledgment

The Board acknowledges receipt and payment of the following milestone fees:

MilestoneAmountDate PaidStatus
Engagement Retainer{{retainerAmount}}{{retainerPaidDate}}Paid
Validation Fee{{validationAmount}}{{validationPaidDate}}Paid
Commitment Fee{{commitmentAmount}}{{commitmentPaidDate}}Paid
§ 03Success Balance Authorization
{{successAmount}}
At closing, prior to ownership transfer
Wire transfer to Forhemit operating account
RESOLVED, that the Company is hereby authorized to pay the Success Balance of {{successAmount}} to Forhemit Stewardship Management Co. upon closing of the ESOP transaction, from the Company's ordinary operating account, as an ordinary business expense of the Company.
§ 04Total Fee Summary
Fee ComponentAmount
Engagement Retainer{{retainerAmount}}
Validation Fee{{validationAmount}}
Commitment Fee{{commitmentAmount}}
Success Balance{{successAmount}}
Total Engagement Fee{{totalFee}}
{{stewardshipRate}} — commences Day 121 post-close
Board Acknowledgment: The Board confirms that all fees are paid by the Company as ordinary operating business expenses. Forhemit does not appear on the seller's closing statement and does not reduce seller proceeds.
§ 05Ratification

All prior actions taken by the officers of the Company in connection with the Forhemit engagement and fee payments are hereby ratified, confirmed, and approved in all respects.

This Resolution shall take effect immediately upon adoption and shall remain in full force and effect until superseded by a subsequent resolution of the Board.

—Certification
